creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
I believe this port is affected by a bug similar to bug #222310 (it concerns sbcl, another lisp implementation).

As for sbcl, the installation fails for me with THREADS enabled and works with it disabled (see comment 5 of sbcl's bug).

In the ecl case, pkg-static fails during the registration of the installation: many files under the include/ecl/atomic-ops directory are missing, as well as include/ecl/atomic-ops.h
